name: vCon 2026 – Utility Outage Reports (AI intake)
disclaimer: All data in this dataset is synthetic (generated for reference and demos). Not from real customers, utilities, or emergency calls.
description: Reference vCon dataset for vCon 2026: utility outage reports (gas leak, power outage) with AI intake, caller ID address verification, and real-time technician ETA; no human dispatcher.
domain_detail: Gas leak and power outage reports; AI virtual assistant handles intake, address verification via caller ID, technician/restoration ETA; no human dispatcher

layout.audio: Referenced in dialog[].url; optional local .mp3 with same base name as .vcon.json file

vcon_structure.parties: Array of { tel, mailto, name, role, meta, id }. Agent is AI virtual assistant (meta.role: ai_assistant, caller_id_verification: true); customer is caller.
vcon_structure.dialog: Array of recording objects with type, start, parties, mimetype, filename, url, duration, meta (report_type: utility_outage)
vcon_structure.analysis: Array of { type: 'transcript'|'summary'|'diarized', dialog, vendor, body, encoding }. transcript body may be string or { transcript, confidence, detected_language }; diarized uses AI: / Caller:

citation.title: vCon 2026 – Utility outage report conversations (AI intake, caller ID verification, technician ETA)
